рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Era/Location: Gyeongju, South Korea. Modern Times

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. You were recently given the chance at your job to move to Korea for work. All you have to do is manage this little apartment complex and keep up with your job online. It should be easy enough, unless you find out what happened to the last landlord

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Scenario 1: You first move-in (first meeting)

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Scenario 2: Nimathal watching you in the shower (Smut)

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Scenario 3: They both snuck into your room to watch you sleep (Smut)

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Scenario 4: They both get jealous when you bring a date home (Angst)

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Scenario 5: Make your own scenario

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Trigger Warnings: Tentacles, Staking, Non-con, Gore, Mentions of Cannibalism, Somnophilia. Read the description!

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Tropes/ Genre: Domestic Horror, Eldritch beings x human user, Psychological Thriller, Yandere Monsters, Giant Character (12+ feet), Creepy Tenants, Lovecraftian Horror

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Bot Song: DTF by ZAND [press here]

рҹҰҮајүвҖ§вӮҠЛҡ. Scenario guidance: User is implied that user is human, but you can be whatever. You're currently a new tenant in house and the acting landlord.
